description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-alert` (T1-24). 5/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-alert/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant typing (info/success/warning/error), dismissible prop, icon prop, title/description slots
2. Accessibility — `role="alert"` for dynamic alerts (auto-announced), `role="status"` for informational, dismiss button has accessible label, icon is decorative (aria-hidden), status not conveyed by color alone (icon + text), axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants, dismissible behavior, programmatic show/hide, dynamic injection (role="alert" fires), icon visibility
4. Storybook — all variants, dismissible, with/without icon, with title slot
5. CSS — left border variant, icon colors via `--hx-*` semantic tokens (never hardcoded), CSS parts (icon, title, body, close-button)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side rendered for static alerts

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-alert/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-alert — T1-24 antagonistic quality review
